sources.title: RegTech Funding Surges as AI Rewrites Compliance in 2026

sources.title: AI Set to Transform AML and KYC in 2026
sources.key_data: Agentic AI systems forecast to reshape AML and KYC; four key trends: perpetual KYC, LLMs, AI productionization, cost-per-alert economics

sources.title: The End of the Periodic Review: Perpetual KYC Becomes the 2026 Default
sources.key_data: Perpetual KYC eliminates 70–90% of manual periodic review work; supervisors now expect it as default at institutions at scale; PwC reports 40% maintenance cost reduction

sources.title: AMLA Readiness Starts Now: Ten Practical Moves for 2026
sources.key_data: EU AMLA begins operations 2026; Single Rulebook effective July 2027; AMLA designed from the ground up in the AI era; direct supervision of 40+ major institutions

sources.title: How AMLA Is Reshaping AML Across Europe
sources.key_data: AMLA operations launched June/July 2026; encourages AI and data analytics; fines up to 10% of total annual turnover; standardized reporting across 27 EU states

sources.title: Agentic AI Drives Next Phase of AML Innovation
sources.key_data: Agentic AI systems handling Level 1 alert triage autonomously; 200%–2,000% productivity gains reported; agentic AI forecast as primary driver reshaping AML and KYC

sources.title: RegTech Market for Financial Crime Compliance: Growth to $17.36B by 2032
sources.key_data: Financial crime compliance RegTech: $4.51B in 2025 → $17.36B by 2032 at 21.22% CAGR; AML screening holds 34.8% market share in 2026
